title: Live Monitor
description: Real-time monitoring dashboard with live performance metrics and current system state

panels.title: CPU %
panels.description: Current CPU utilization percentage from ring buffer. Shows ProcessUtilization from sys.dm_os_ring_buffers RING_BUFFER_SCHEDULER_MONITOR.

query.sqlServer: SELECT TOP 1 CONVERT(XML,record).value('(./Record/SchedulerMonitorEvent/SystemHealth/ProcessUtilization)[1]','int') AS [Value] FROM sys.dm_os_ring_buffers WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE ring_buffer_type='RING_BUFFER_SCHEDULER_MONITOR' ORDER BY timestamp DESC

panels.title: Blocking Sessions
panels.description: Current blocking sessions and lock waits from system DMVs

query.sqlServer:
SELECT
    sp.spid AS [SPID],
    sp.blocked AS [Blocked By],
    sp.waittime AS [Wait Time (ms)],
    sp.lastwaittype AS [Wait Type],
    sp.cpu AS [CPU],
    sp.physical_io AS [Physical IO],
    DB_NAME(sp.dbid) AS [Database],
    sp.loginame AS [Login],
    sp.program_name AS [Program],
    SUBSTRING(st.text, (sp.stmt_start / 2) + 1, (
        CASE sp.stmt_end
            WHEN -1 THEN DATALENGTH(st.text)
            ELSE sp.stmt_end
        END - sp.stmt_start) / 2 + 1) AS [Current SQL]
FROM sys.sysprocesses sp WITH (NOLOCK)
OUTER APPLY sys.dm_exec_sql_text(sp.sql_handle) st
WHERE sp.blocked <> 0
ORDER BY sp.waittime DESC
